chunks.text: JUDGMENT SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Acquittal Appeal.No.S-30 of 2022. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _________________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.1293/2022. 03. For orders on M.A.No.1294/2022. 04. For orders on M.A.No.1295/2022. 05. For hearing of main case. 30.03.2023 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Ansari, Advocate for the appellant. = * = * = * = * = * = 1. Deferred. 2 to 5. The appellant alleging his dispossession from the subject property filed a direct complaint for the prosecution of private respondents for having committed an offence punishable U/S. 3/4 of Illegal Dispossession Act, 2005; it was brought on record and after due trial, the private respondents were acquitted by learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur, vide judgment dated 02.02.2022, which is impugned by the appellant before this Court by preferring the instant criminal acquittal appeal; it is filed beyond 30 days time, which is prescribed under Sub Section (2-A) to Section 417 Cr.PC. No cogent reason for condonation of such delay is advanced by the appellant; consequently, the instant criminal acquittal appeal being time barred is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE
